title: TrustAgent-IIoT source data and reproducibility package
description: Source data, executable calibrated simulation code, validation outputs, and reproducibility metadata associated with the TrustAgent-IIoT manuscript. The package reports results from an executable calibrated simulation and does not contain raw Edge-IIoTset or TON_IoT records, a Hyperledger Fabric deployment, or measurements from a physical IIoT testbed.
